guardrails.reason: Thor and Creative Technique both have prior strong-seed regressions in tutor packages.
The current shell is mana-hungry; direct tutor-over-ramp swaps are cross-lane and not seed-safe.
Land Tax/topdeck engines have high measured exposure and require explicit access-lane comparison before battle.

summary.recommended_next_action: do_not_gate_direct_tutor_swap; benchmark same-access cuts or build additive package
